verses.latin_vulgate: Onus Ninive. Liber visionis Nahum Elcesæi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַשָּׂ֖א נִֽינְוֵ֑ה סֵ֧פֶר חֲז֛וֹן נַח֖וּם הָאֶלְקֹשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: The burden of Nineveh. The book of the vision of Nahum the Elkoshite.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus æmulator, et ulciscens Dominus :  ulciscens Dominus, et habens furorem :  ulciscens Dominus in hostes suos,  et irascens ipse inimicis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣ל קַנּ֤וֹא וְנֹקֵם֙ יְהֹוָ֔ה נֹקֵ֥ם יְהֹוָ֖ה וּבַ֣עַל חֵמָ֑ה נֹקֵ֤ם יְהֹוָה֙ לְצָרָ֔יו וְנוֹטֵ֥ר ה֖וּא לְאֹיְבָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: God is jealous, and the Lord revengeth; the Lord revengeth, and is furious; the Lord will take vengeance on his adversaries, and he reserveth wrath for his enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus patiens, et magnus fortitudine,  et mundans non faciet innocentem.  Dominus in tempestate et turbine viæ ejus,  et nebulæ pulvis pedum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֗ה אֶ֤רֶךְ אַפַּ֙יִם֙ (וגדול) [וּגְדׇל־]כֹּ֔חַ וְנַקֵּ֖ה לֹ֣א יְנַקֶּ֑ה יְהֹוָ֗ה בְּסוּפָ֤ה וּבִשְׂעָרָה֙ דַּרְכּ֔וֹ וְעָנָ֖ן אֲבַ֥ק רַגְלָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is slow to anger, and great in power, and will not at all acquit the wicked: the Lord hath his way in the whirlwind and in the storm, and the clouds are the dust of his feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Increpans mare, et exsiccans illud,  et omnia flumina ad desertum deducens.  Infirmatus est Basan et Carmelus,  et flos Libani elanguit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גּוֹעֵ֤ר בַּיָּם֙ וַֽיַּבְּשֵׁ֔הוּ וְכׇל־הַנְּהָר֖וֹת הֶחֱרִ֑יב אֻמְלַ֤ל בָּשָׁן֙ וְכַרְמֶ֔ל וּפֶ֥רַח לְבָנ֖וֹן אֻמְלָֽל׃
verses.king_james: He rebuketh the sea, and maketh it dry, and drieth up all the rivers: Bashan languisheth, and Carmel, and the flower of Lebanon languisheth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Montes commoti sunt ab eo,  et colles desolati sunt :  et contremuit terra a facie ejus,  et orbis, et omnes habitantes in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָרִים֙ רָעֲשׁ֣וּ מִמֶּ֔נּוּ וְהַגְּבָע֖וֹת הִתְמֹגָ֑גוּ וַתִּשָּׂ֤א הָאָ֙רֶץ֙ מִפָּנָ֔יו וְתֵבֵ֖ל וְכׇל־י֥וֹשְׁבֵי בָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: The mountains quake at him, and the hills melt, and the earth is burned at his presence, yea, the world, and all that dwell therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ante faciem indignationis ejus quis stabit ?  et quis resistet in ira furoris ejus ?  Indignatio ejus effusa est ut ignis,  et petræ dissolutæ sunt ab eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִפְנֵ֤י זַעְמוֹ֙ מִ֣י יַעֲמ֔וֹד וּמִ֥י יָק֖וּם בַּחֲר֣וֹן אַפּ֑וֹ חֲמָתוֹ֙ נִתְּכָ֣ה כָאֵ֔שׁ וְהַצֻּרִ֖ים נִתְּצ֥וּ מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: Who can stand before his indignation? and who can abide in the fierceness of his anger? his fury is poured out like fire, and the rocks are thrown down by him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bonus Dominus,  et confortans in die tribulationis,  et sciens sperantes in se.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ט֣וֹב יְהֹוָ֔ה לְמָע֖וֹז בְּי֣וֹם צָרָ֑ה וְיֹדֵ֖עַ חֹ֥סֵי בֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is good, a strong hold in the day of trouble; and he knoweth them that trust in him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et in diluvio prætereunte consummationem faciet loci ejus,  et inimicos ejus persequentur tenebræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְשֶׁ֣טֶף עֹבֵ֔ר כָּלָ֖ה יַעֲשֶׂ֣ה מְקוֹמָ֑הּ וְאֹיְבָ֖יו יְרַדֶּף־חֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.king_james: But with an overrunning flood he will make an utter end of the place thereof, and darkness shall pursue his enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quid cogitatis contra Dominum ?  Consummationem ipse faciet :  non consurget duplex tribulatio,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַה־תְּחַשְּׁבוּן֙ אֶל־יְהֹוָ֔ה כָּלָ֖ה ה֣וּא עֹשֶׂ֑ה לֹא־תָק֥וּם פַּעֲמַ֖יִם צָרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: What do ye imagine against the Lord? he will make an utter end: affliction shall not rise up the second time.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia sicut spinæ se invicem complectuntur,  sic convivium eorum pariter potantium ;  consumentur quasi stipula ariditate plena.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֚י עַד־סִירִ֣ים סְבֻכִ֔ים וּכְסׇבְאָ֖ם סְבוּאִ֑ים אֻ֨כְּל֔וּ כְּקַ֥שׁ יָבֵ֖שׁ מָלֵֽא׃
verses.king_james: For while they be folden together as thorns, and while they are drunken as drunkards, they shall be devoured as stubble fully dry.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ex te exibit cogitans contra Dominum malitiam,  mente pertractans prævaricationem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִמֵּ֣ךְ יָצָ֔א חֹשֵׁ֥ב עַל־יְהֹוָ֖ה רָעָ֑ה יֹעֵ֖ץ בְּלִיָּֽעַל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: There is one come out of thee, that imagineth evil against the Lord, a wicked counsellor.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus :  Si perfecti fuerint, et ita plures,  sic quoque attondentur, et pertransibit :  afflixi te, et non affligam te ultra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֣ה ׀ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה אִם־שְׁלֵמִים֙ וְכֵ֣ן רַבִּ֔ים וְכֵ֥ן נָג֖וֹזּוּ וְעָבָ֑ר וְעִ֨נִּתִ֔ךְ לֹ֥א אֲעַנֵּ֖ךְ עֽוֹד׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord; Though they be quiet, and likewise many, yet thus shall they be cut down, when he shall pass through. Though I have afflicted thee, I will afflict thee no more.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc conteram virgam ejus de dorso tuo,  et vincula tua disrumpam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֕ה אֶשְׁבֹּ֥ר מֹטֵ֖הוּ מֵעָלָ֑יִךְ וּמוֹסְרֹתַ֖יִךְ אֲנַתֵּֽק׃
verses.king_james: For now will I break his yoke from off thee, and will burst thy bonds in sunder.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et præcipiet super te Dominus ;  non seminabitur ex nomine tuo amplius :  de domo Dei tui interficiam sculptile, et conflatile ;  ponam sepulchrum tuum, quia inhonoratus es.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְצִוָּ֤ה עָלֶ֙יךָ֙ יְהֹוָ֔ה לֹא־יִזָּרַ֥ע מִשִּׁמְךָ֖ ע֑וֹד מִבֵּ֨ית אֱלֹהֶ֜יךָ אַכְרִ֨ית פֶּ֧סֶל וּמַסֵּכָ֛ה אָשִׂ֥ים קִבְרֶ֖ךָ כִּ֥י קַלּֽוֹתָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And the Lord hath given a commandment concerning thee, that no more of thy name be sown: out of the house of thy gods will I cut off the graven image and the molten image: I will make thy grave; for thou art vile.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce super montes pedes evangelizantis,  et annuntiantis pacem.  Celebra, Juda, festivitates tuas,  et redde vota tua,  quia non adjiciet ultra ut pertranseat in te Belial :  universus interiit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֨ה עַל־הֶהָרִ֜ים רַגְלֵ֤י מְבַשֵּׂר֙ מַשְׁמִ֣יעַ שָׁל֔וֹם חׇגִּ֧י יְהוּדָ֛ה חַגַּ֖יִךְ שַׁלְּמִ֣י נְדָרָ֑יִךְ כִּי֩ לֹ֨א יוֹסִ֥יף ע֛וֹד (לעבור) [לַעֲבׇר־]בָּ֥ךְ בְּלִיַּ֖עַל כֻּלֹּ֥ה נִכְרָֽת׃
verses.king_james: Behold upon the mountains the feet of him that bringeth good tidings, that publisheth peace! O Judah, keep thy solemn feasts, perform thy vows: for the wicked shall no more pass through thee; he is utterly cut off.
